titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Salih Ibn Al-Hakam
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Salih Ibn Al-Hakam

segments: ه عن صالح بن الحكم فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن الحسين أبي الخطّاب، عن جعفر بن بشير، عن حمّاد بن عثمان، عن صالح بن الحكم الأحول‌.
arabic.text: ه عن صالح بن الحكم فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن الحسين أبي الخطّاب، عن جعفر بن بشير، عن حمّاد بن عثمان، عن صالح بن الحكم الأحول‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Salih ibn Al-Hakam has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn Abi Al-Khattab, from Ja'far ibn Bashir, from Hammad ibn 'Uthman, from Salih ibn Al-Hakam Al-Ahwal.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Salih ibn Al-Hakam has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn Abi Al-Khattab, from Ja'far ibn Bashir, from Hammad ibn 'Uthman, from Salih ibn Al-Hakam Al-Ahwal.
